source: IRDAI Annual Report 2023-24: aggregate combined ratio Indian general insurance ~108%. ICICI Lombard FY25: 104.3%, Star Health FY25: 97.8% (profitable), PSU players 112-120%.
IRDAI mandated disclosure. ICICI Lombard FY25: 27.5%. Bajaj Allianz FY25: ~26%. New India FY25: ~29%. PSU players: 30-38%. IRDAI regulatory cap: 30% for private, 35% for PSU.
IRDAI FY24: Industry net loss ratio ~75%. ICICI Lombard FY25: 76.8%. Commercial lines: 60-70%. Health: 85-95%.
IRDAI Annual Report 2023-24: aggregate industry commission ratio 11-15%. Retail health: 18-22%. Commercial: 7-10%. Direct channel reduces commissions significantly.
IRDAI Digital Insurance Repository: direct digital channel share growing. ICICI Lombard FY25: 22% direct digital. Industry average ~15-20%. Fintechs (Digit, Acko): 100% digital.
IRDAI expense-of-management disclosures. ICICI Lombard FY25: ~9%. New India Assurance FY25: ~15% (higher due to large PSU workforce). Private insurers: 8-13%.
